name: Hurxley Corporation
summary: Hurxley Corporation operates Hokka Hokka Tei franchise chain stores in Japan. Its stores offer take-out boxed lunch. The company was formerly known as Kansai Hokka-Hokka Tei Corp. and changed its name to Hurxley Corporation in July 1993. Hurxley Corporation was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
